title: aristida calycina
intro: Aristida calycina, also known as the six-angled beard grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aristida calycina include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
